song.info: halfway through the song an ice cream man came on stage ringing a cowbell) (>

song.name: Cream
song.info: live debut by Phish) (with ice cream man walking around the venue ringing a cowbell

song.name: Harry Hood
song.info: with ice cream man, cows, dancers, and flying milk cartons; dancers left through ice cream freezer

song.name: Also sprach Zarathustra, op. 30
song.info: ice cream men brought out giant ice cream props; Trey moved to drums; Fish was given a helmet

song.name: Auld Lang Syne
song.info: a fake Fish rose from the freezer with a giant popsicle and blew up in the sky

song.name: Tweezer
song.info: with Meatstick teases; dancers from past NYE gags left the freezer and did the Meatstick dance) (>

song.name: Piper
song.info: with "Sneakin' Sally Through the Alley" teases) (>

song.name: Sincere
song.info: a cappella; live debut by Phish

setlist.info: the band came out for the encore dressed as ice cream men
